use_codes.desc: ADJUNCTIVE THERAPY TO LIPID-LOWERING MEDICATIONS AND DIET TO REDUCE LOW DENSITY LIPOPROTEIN-CHOLESTEROL, APOLIPOPROTEIN B, TOTAL CHOLESTEROL, AND NON-HIGH DENSITY LIPOPROTEIN CHOLESTEROL IN PTS WITH HOMOZYGOUS FAMILIAL HYPERCHOLESTEROLEMIA
